subject: COURSE NAME
title: Round N
notes: Optional description of this pack's focus.

questions._comment: MULTIPLE CHOICE — use for direct recall, single-concept distinction
questions.explanation: Why the correct answer is right and what concept it tests.

questions._comment: TRUE/FALSE — use for textbook traps, misconceptions
questions.prompt: True or False: Statement to evaluate.

questions._comment: MATCHING — use for term/definition pairs, breadth review
questions.prompt: Match each term to its description.

questions._comment: SCENARIO MULTIPLE CHOICE — use for applied concepts, normalization problems
questions.prompt: Given this scenario: [describe situation]. What is the best approach?
questions.explanation: Why this approach works in the given scenario.
